title: Vitax Tree Fern And Palm Feed, For Tree Ferns, Ferns, Palms And Grasses. The Perfect Balance Of Nutrients To Maximise Growth, Easy To Use, Concentrated - 500Ml Makes 50L
features: REPLICATES NATURAL NUTRIENTS: Tree Fern and Palm Feed is developed to mimic the nutrients found in the decaying vegetation found around ferns in forests, promoting optimal growth and health for your plants.
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for tree ferns, ferns, palms, bamboo, and grasses, providing a balanced mixture of major plant nutrients to support a wide range of plants.
BALANCED NUTRIENTS: Contains a carefully balanced mixture of major nutrients, plus added magnesium and trace elements, ensuring strong, healthy plants.
OPTIMAL GROWTH SUPPORT: Perfect for both potted and ground-planted tree ferns, indoor and outdoor palms, bamboos, grasses, and other ferns, enhancing color and growth.

"EASY CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Water regularly to keep the trunk damp and spray with water during hot or dry conditions. Avoid feeding during establishment; after the first year, apply liquid feed to the crown and trunk every 7 to 10 days during the growing season from mid-spring to mid-summer. "
description: From the brand Previous page Our Horticultural Heritage Our origins can be traced back to G H Richards Ltd, in 1880 and based in London. Mr Richards was a pioneer of insecticides and supplier of horticultural sundries. What makes our products unique? As a business closely involved with the UK garden and horticultural markets for over 100 years, we place a high priority on developing products which will protect, nurture and respect our environment. Generations of gardeners trust Vitax products Vitax aims to produce the highest quality products, this is shown in achieving production standards BSI ISO14001 and ISO9001. Shop Our Range Eric Hutchinson, the first Managing Director of Vitax Limited, wrote the eponymous Vitax Gardening Book in the 1950s. Full of information, tips and ideas, the book proved to be a popular and invaluable guide to traditional gardening. That love for gardening still goes into all of our products today Based in Coalville, Leicestershire, we are a truly British brand. The majority of our products are produced in the UK, something we are proud of. Vitax has held the quality production standard BS5750/ISO9002 since 1993, testament to the quality of the products we produce. Our wide range of over 140 garden and plant-related products include well-known brands such as: Slug Gone, 6X, Vitax Q4, Stay Off, Nippon and SBK Weedkiller. We have a wide range of fertilisers, soil conditioners and plant specific nutrients designed to enhance the quality of your plants, trees and shrubs. Next page

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always wear appropriate protective clothing, gloves, and eye protection when handling and applying this fertilizer. Do not eat, drink, or smoke when using this product. Keep out of reach of children and pets. If accidentally ingested, seek medical advice and show the container or label. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of accidental contact, rinse thoroughly with water. For environmental impact considerations, do not apply near waterways or drainage areas. Always follow the manufacturer's instructions for use and dispose of empty containers in a responsible manner.
